data.name: Guilty Pleasures
data.detailed_description:
💖 RELEASE VERY SOON 💖


關於此遊戲

You are Marcus Holmes, a young private detective and the nephew of the legendary sleuth Arthur Holmes, known in elite circles as “The Detective of Desire” — a man who unraveled the intimate secrets of the rich and powerful: affairs, disappearances, scandals, and betrayals.

Now Arthur is dead.  The official cause — a heart attack.  But his will says:

“All my possessions, including my archives, are to be inherited by my nephew.  Along with them — my final secret.”

You move into his penthouse — a place still scented with expensive perfume, coffee, and unspoken words. Among the old papers, you find an encrypted dossier marked “L.U.S.T.”

From that moment, your life becomes a chain of mysterious encounters, letters, and confessions from Arthur’s former clients — beautiful, dangerous women who may be connected to his death.

No scripts — create your own scenarios: you decide who, how, and where you fuck. Experiment with sex, influence the heroines and the environment, and create scenes ranging from romantic to hardcore. The world reacts dynamically — public debauchery changes the city, unlocking new events, clubs, and risks like jail.

1. Liberating the Heroines 

  • Seduce or dominate the girls, raising their "Corruption Level" 

  • Unlock new positions, sex acts, and scenes — from private encounters to public orgies. 

  • The more you experiment, the bolder they become: invite other characters to join in for a gangbang! 

2. Public Sex & Consequences 

  • Have sex anywhere — in the park, the bar, or on the street. 

  • A "Wanted Meter" system: too much public action increases the risk of arrest (and jail has its own unique "entertainments").

  • The world reacts: rumors can attract allies, maniacs, or the police. 

3. Sandbox: Total Freedom 

  • No scripts — create your own scenarios. You have the ultimate power to decide who, how, and where you fuck.

Guilty Pleasures combines elements of detective investigation, a sandbox, and an interactive thriller.

  • Investigation: Freely explore the house and city streets, search for clues, analyze the environment, and examine personal items and documents. 

  • Mini-games: Eavesdrop on conversations, crack passwords, hack devices, conduct surveillance, and interrogate characters by choosing your pressure tactics. 

  • Social System: Exchange texts and calls with characters; manipulate them, gain their trust or incite fear, and extract information through flirting or threats. 

  • Moral Choices: Decide what matters most to you — the truth, passion, or personal gain. 

  • Multiple Endings: The fate of Marcus and the resolution of Arthur's mystery depend on who you trust and what lines you are willing to cross.

data.short_description: You are Marcus Holmes, a young private detective and nephew of the legendary detective Arthur Holmes, known among the elite as the “Detective of Passion” — a man who uncovered the intimate secrets of the rich and famous: affairs, love triangles, model disappearances, scandals in high society.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 俄文*, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 阿拉伯文, 越南文, 繁體中文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 荷蘭文, 波蘭文, 泰文, 土耳其文, 烏克蘭文, 日文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • 處理器: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS: Windows 10 or later (x64)
  • Processor: 2,0 GHz Core 2 Duo
  • Memory: 8 GB RAM
  • Graphics: nVIDIA GeForce GTX 750 (2GB+ of VRAM)
  • Storage: 2 GB available space
pc_requirements.recommended:
Recommended:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
